title: FSR Eternal Winter Fabric
description: survival in a forever frozen world
body:
fabric version of Eternal Winter forge version

Eternal Winter is a minecraft modpack designed around a harder survival world. This modpack is inspired by the long dark and surviving in harsh conditions. Use technology in new ways to survive the harsh conditions of a world not thought of before. Expand past what you once knew and gain knowledge of surviving in a much harsher condition where food and medical supplies are scarse. Are you able to survive these harsh conditions?

Their will be a starter kit as well as some basic items contained in backpack for every new world on start.

Mod's contained in this modpack not on Modrinth:
